## FadeAndSlide class

Renders a transition group wrapping the elements passed in the default slot and animating them with a fade and slide animation.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class FadeAndSlide extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [tag](./x-components.fadeandslide.tag.md) |  | string | HTML Element that the transition-group children will be wrapped in. |
